summary: Frontend testing for DeliveryEstimate component completed. All 6 features tested and PASSED. The component correctly renders on product cards, accepts PIN code input, auto-checks delivery on 6 digits, shows delivery date/source/courier, applies green success styling, and shows helper text.

features_tested.DeliveryEstimate component renders: PASSED - Found 4 PIN code input fields on product page (one per product card)
features_tested.PIN code input visible with placeholder: PASSED - Input has placeholder 'Enter PIN code'
features_tested.Valid PIN code (400001) shows estimate: PASSED - Shows 'Fast Delivery: Mar 17, 2026 - Ships from Delhi via DTDC Air 500gm'
features_tested.Delivery estimate shows date/source/cour: PASSED - Date (Mar 17, 2026), Source (Delhi), Courier (DTDC Air 500gm) all visible
features_tested.Green success styling on estimate: PASSED - Background rgb(240, 253, 244), border 1px solid rgb(187, 247, 208)
features_tested.Helper text when no PIN entered: PASSED - Shows 'Enter PIN code to check delivery time'
features_tested.Check button functionality: PASSED - Button works correctly to manually trigger estimate
features_tested.Bihar warehouse (800001): PASSED - Ships from Bihar via Xpressbees Surface (nearest warehouse)
features_tested.Delhi warehouse (110001): PASSED - Ships from Delhi via Xpressbees Surface (nearest warehouse)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ DeliveryEstimate component correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env
✓ Auto-checks delivery when 6 digits entered (no need to click Check button)
✓ Green success styling (#f0fdf4 background) for positive feedback
✓ data-testid attributes present: delivery-pincode-input, check-delivery-btn, delivery-estimate-result
✓ Component correctly integrated into FragranceGrid at lines 548-551
✓ API returns fastest courier from nearest warehouse (Delhi or Bihar)
context_for_next_testing_agent: DeliveryEstimate component is working correctly on all 4 product cards. Uses real ShipRocket API (not mocked). Test PIN codes: 400001 (Mumbai - 3 days from Delhi), 800001 (Patna - 2 days from Bihar), 110001 (Delhi - 2 days from Delhi). Component auto-checks when 6 digits entered. Green success styling confirms positive UX.
